label: Clinical efficacy
description: Randomized, challenge, or real-world evidence that the vaccine prevents influenza infection or illness.

label: Immunogenicity
description: HAI, neutralization, seroconversion, seroprotection, cell-mediated, mucosal, or other immune responses.

label: Safety/reactogenicity
description: Solicited and unsolicited adverse events, serious adverse events, AESIs, tolerability, discontinuations.

label: Correlates/mechanism
description: Evidence on correlates of protection, breadth, durability, conserved antigens, immune imprinting, or mechanism.

label: Regulatory/policy
description: Regulatory submissions, authorizations, advisory committee material, national recommendations, vaccine composition.

label: Programmatic/access
description: Implementation, availability, manufacturing, commercialization, supply, target population, market access signals.

label: Pipeline landscape
description: Landscape summaries, stage transitions, portfolio status, and technology platform surveillance.

label: Real-world effectiveness
description: Post-authorization effectiveness, observational studies, surveillance, and effectiveness by season or population.
